name: Lowfat Icing
recipeIngredient: 1 80 oz. container cool whip (thawed) - I used Cool Whip Lite
recipeInstructions:
1 Combine pudding mix, sugar, and milk in a small bowl.
2 Beat slowly with a rotary beater until well blended, about 1 minute.
3 Fold in whipped topping.
4 Spread on cake that is completely cooled.
